content.full_text:
March 30, 2001

Stephen H. Luhrs
5324 Appletree Court
Orangevale, CA 95662

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-00-249

Dear Mr. Luhrs:

This letter memorializes our conversation of March 29, 2001, wherein you withdrew your November 7, 2000, request for written advice from the Fair Political Practices Commission. We apologize for any inconvenience caused by our delay in contacting you.

Please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660 should you have any additional questions or comments.

Very truly yours,

John W. Wallace
Senior Counsel, Legal Division
